OTEL_SERVICE_NAME.description: Service name as it appears in traces and metrics (e.g. 'invoicely-api')

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT.description: OTLP exporter endpoint (e.g. http://localhost:4317 for local Jaeger, or your cloud provider endpoint)

LOG_FORMAT.description: Log output format. Use 'json' in production, 'text' for local development.
